title: Tiny Browser Games While Your AI Agent Runs Tests
keyword: games while AI agent runs tests
datapoint: Arcade Skill launches from a verified HTML bundle of about 20 KB and keeps ads disabled in localhost sessions.
intent: Developers waiting on Codex, Claude Code, npm install, CI, or long local tests.

title: A Retro Break Game For Claude Code Wait Time
datapoint: The hosted play route is https://arcade.fxpeek.com/play/ and the installed skill uses https://arcade.fxpeek.com/manifest.json for updates.
intent: Users who want a harmless local arcade break instead of doom-scrolling during agent waits.

title: A Tiny Retro Game For Codex CLI Wait Time
datapoint: Arcade Skill publishes a sha256-verified single HTML game bundle and opens it through a small local Python launcher.
intent: Codex CLI users waiting for edits, dependency installs, test runs, reviews, and long terminal commands.

title: AI Agent 跑测试时玩的复古小游戏
keyword: AI agent 跑测试 小游戏
datapoint: Arcade Skill 的本地技能壳只负责拉取 manifest、校验 sha256、打开浏览器，游戏本体通过热更新下发。
intent: 正在等 Codex、Claude Code、依赖安装、测试跑完的开发者。
